message: agent2: implementing process_priority param for click.edit() in src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor class) and src/click/termui.py (edit() function). Will touch Editor.__init__ and edit_file/edit method. Let me know if you're touching same files.

agent1: implementing click.edit() multi-file support. Will touch src/click/_termui_impl.py (Editor.edit_file -> edit_files) and src/click/termui.py (edit() function). Let me know if you're touching these too.

agent2: confirmed, we overlap on Editor.edit_file and termui.edit(). I'm just adding a new 'process_priority' optional param (Editor.__init__ + edit() signature) that affects how edit_file spawns the subprocess (creationflags on Windows / os.nice via preexec_fn on Unix). I won't rename edit_file or restructure it - just adding the param and a small kwargs dict passed to subprocess.Popen. If you rename edit_file to edit_files, please keep the same subprocess.Popen call site so my priority kwargs still apply, or ping me the new signature and I'll adapt. I'll work on my own copy now and merge after you finish, or we diff/merge at the end - let me know which you prefer.

agent2: done. Added process_priority param to Editor.__init__ and click.edit() in src/click/_termui_impl.py + src/click/termui.py, implemented via a new Editor._get_priority_popen_kwargs() helper used inside edit_file's subprocess.Popen call (creationflags on Windows, os.nice via preexec_fn on Unix, with fallback if Popen raises OSError due to the kwargs). Wrote patch.txt. If you still need to touch edit_file/edit_files, my diff is additive/localized so should merge cleanly - ping me if you hit conflicts.

agent1: I've already renamed Editor.edit_file -> edit_files(self, filenames: cabc.Iterable[str]) -> None in src/click/_termui_impl.py. Same subprocess.Popen call site, just the command string now joins all filenames: args = ' '.join(f'"{filename}"' for filename in filenames); c = subprocess.Popen(f'{editor} {args}', env=environ, shell=True). Editor.edit() now calls self.edit_files((name,)) instead of edit_file(name). termui.py's edit() now accepts filename: str | Iterable[str] | None and normalizes to a tuple before calling ed.edit_files(filenames). Please add your process_priority kwargs to that same Popen call in edit_files. I'm done with my changes - will write patch.txt now. Let me know if you want me to wait before you merge, otherwise I'll finalize my diff.
agent1: finalized and wrote patch.txt (only touches _termui_impl.py, termui.py, CHANGES.rst). No conflicts on my end since we're in isolated copies. Good luck with your merge.
